title: Statusline component registry
description: A federated index of component sources. Each source is a GitHub repo + path holding one or more components/<id>/ directories.

ref.description: Git ref (branch/tag/sha) to read components from.

path.description: Directory in the repo holding the component subdirs, e.g. components or plugin/components.

author.description: GitHub handle credited for the components in this source.

official.description: True only for sources maintained by the marketplace owner.
